item.title: Novel Technique to Detect Cloud Threat Actor Operations
item.author: Nathaniel Quist
item.content:encoded: We introduce a novel method that maps cloud alert trends to MITRE ATT&CK techniques. The patterns created could identify threat actors by behavior.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, February 6th, 2026 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9798, (Fri, Feb 6th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: The Shadow Campaigns: Uncovering Global Espionage
item.author: Unit 42
item.content:encoded: In 2025 a threat group compromised government and critical infrastructure in 37 countries, with reconnaissance in 155.

item.title: Broken Phishing URLs, (Thu, Feb 5th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: For a few days, many phishing emails that landed into my mailbox contain strange URLs. They are classic emails asking you to open a document, verify your pending emails, …
